39. The order dated 24th April, 2023, passed by the High Court of Judicature 
at Allahabad is quashed and set aside and as a consequence, the 
impugned FIR No. 269 of 2022 and all the consequent proceedings 
sought to be taken thereunder against the appellant are also quashed 
and set aside. 
40. The appeal is allowed accordingly.
41. Pending application(s), if any, shall stand disposed of.
Result of the case: Appeal allowed.
